```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
source("../R/matches-file-type.R")
source("../R/create-reference-Rmd.R")
source("../R/get-categories.R")

file_metadata <- read.csv(
  "../inst/metadata/file-metadata.csv",
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM"
)
column_metadata <- read.csv(
  "../inst/metadata/column-metadata.csv",
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM"
)
category_set_metadata <- read.csv(
  "../inst/metadata/category-set.csv",
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM"
)
create_reference_Rmd(
  file_metadata,
  column_metadata,
  category_set_metadata
)
```
